canonical_operators.language: put the chocolate pudding in the top drawer of the cabinet and close it

operators.name: Place
operators.description: put the chocolate pudding in the top drawer of the cabinet

operators.name: Close
operators.description: close the top drawer of the cabinet

annotation.description: The robot arm moves to and picks up the chocolate pudding from the kitchen table.
The robot places the chocolate pudding into the open top drawer of the cabinet.
The robot arm pushes the top drawer of the cabinet to close it, with the chocolate pudding already placed inside.
